name: The Pregnation
description:
You are a girl who is having economic problems since you decided to run away from home... but all is not lost. you live in the city with the lowest population, so the government pays women to have children. it is your choice to keep the children you produce but so far the best job for a woman is to give birth.Prostitution, pregnancy, and birth. Let's increase the world's population!

You can check your character's stats by entering {{User}}'s Status

Hi, I know you love the Gender bend bots that I make, but I also want to make the ones that have to do with pregnancy since it is also a fetish that I have.

I hope you like it and let me know if there are any bugs.
